creator: taob@gate.sinica.edu.tw
text:
We are missing the man pages for the SHM-related functions in
<sys/shm.h> (shminit(), shmget(), shmat(), shmctl(), etc., etc.).
Joerg Wunsch suggests:  "Since the code is copyrighted by Charles
Hannum, maybe NetBSD has them already?"

How-To-Repeat: 
	"man shmget".  :)
